subject: [PATCH] mm: make mmap_miss accounting symmetric for VM_SEQ_READ

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch description does not explicitly mention adding Reviewed-by tag, and suggested adding it.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch makes the mmap_miss accounting symmetric for VM_SEQ_READ mappings by skipping the decrement in both do_async_mmap_readahead and filemap_map_pages when the mapping is sequential read. This ensures that the counter only moves for mappings that also participate in the increment side, preventing a single mapping from biasing the counter for other mappings of the same file.
